channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Kia’s EV3 Is Headed to the US This Year With Up to 320 Miles of Range
item.description: There's set to be a new, compact EV in town soon.

item.title: 'Defying logic': This quantum battery actually charges faster the bigger it gets
item.description: This quantum device absorbs energy efficiently, accelerates charging with scale, and stores power temporarily, though it's still limited in practical output.

item.title: This Is the Way to Lego’s April Releases
item.description: Next month might be the traditional big 'Star Wars' drop from Lego, but April is all about 'The Mandalorian and Grogu'.

item.title: This iOS 18 patch could protect your device from a vicious malware strain — here’s why you need it now
item.description: Apple has patched iOS 18 to protect users from the DarkSword malware, even if they have an older device.

item.title: Group Pushing Age Verification Requirements for AI Turns Out to Be Sneakily Backed by OpenAI
item.description: It gave the leader of a nonprofit involved with it "a very grimy feeling."

item.title: 30+ tech deals still going strong after Amazons spring sale — Save $50 on iPads, $100 on Bose headphones
item.description: Mashable's tech editor pulls the best last-chance deals on Apple gear, Bose headphones, and Fire TV sticks from the Amazon Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Amazon Facilities in Bahrain Hit Again as Iran Follows Through on Threat, Report Says
item.description: Iran had promised to hit American tech companies on April 1st.

item.title: Why the PS6 Handheld Will Matter More Than the PS6
item.description: After the second round of PS5 price hikes, our best hope for an affordable next-gen console may be Sony's rumored PS6 handheld.

item.title: DNA Study Casts Even More Doubt on Shroud of Turin’s True Origin
item.description: The infamous Shroud of Turin has been surrounded by controversy since it first appeared in the historical record.

item.title: Sam Witwer Is Ready for Maul’s Moment
item.description: It was animation that gave Darth Maul a second chance, years after his seeming end in 'The Phantom Menace'. Now, he's starring in his own TV show—and the man behind Maul couldn't be happier.

item.title: Lil Finder Guy is the cutest thing Apple has made in its 50-year history — and it has a secret
item.description: People are going gaga over Apple's Lil Finder Guy, who arrived just in time for Apple's 50th Anniversary, but there's more to him than just a cute face.
